issue.message: Attribute `localeConfig` is only used in API level 33 and higher (current min is 26)
A newer version of Gradle than 8.13 is available: 8.14.4
A newer version of androidx.core:core-ktx than 1.12.0 is available: 1.17.0
A newer version of androidx.constraintlayout:constraintlayout than 2.1.4 is available: 2.2.1
A newer version of androidx.security:security-crypto than 1.0.0 is available: 1.1.0
A newer version of com.google.android.gms:play-services-auth than 20.7.0 is available: 21.5.1
A newer version of com.github.mwiede:jsch than 0.2.21 is available: 2.27.8
A newer version of com.google.api-client:google-api-client-android than 2.2.0 is available: 2.9.0
A newer version of com.google.api-client:google-api-client-gson than 2.2.0 is available: 2.9.0
A newer version of com.google.http-client:google-http-client-android than 1.43.3 is available: 2.1.0
A newer version of com.squareup.moshi:moshi-kotlin than 1.15.1 is available: 1.15.2
A newer version of com.google.guava:guava than 31.1-jre is available: 33.5.0-jre

issue.errorLine1: <string name="main_plays_subtitle">Run reusable host plays without leaving the home screen.</string>
<string name="main_plays_empty_add_host">Add a host before running plays.</string>
<string name="main_plays_empty_add_play">Add your first play to get started.</string>
<string name="session_terminal_input_hint">Type to send directly to shell</string>
<string name="session_command_not_connected">Connect to a host before running commands.</string>
<string name="placeholder_footer">sushi v%1$s - Open source SSH client</string>
<string name="terminal_live_input_hint">Type and send directly to shell</string>
<string name="terminal_connect_retry_log">[Terminal] Initial connect failed, retrying in %1$d ms...</string>
<string name="ssh_section_subtitle">Set the host and credentials for the terminal session.</string>
<string name="ssh_helper">Leave password empty if using private key authentication.</string>
<string name="jump_enabled_label_disabled">Use jump server (add another host first)</string>
<string name="jump_helper">Optional: connect through a jump server first.</string>
<string name="jump_no_hosts_available">Create another host before enabling jump server.</string>
<string name="jump_required_fields">Jump host and jump username are required.</string>
<string name="jump_required_selection">Select a jump server from the host list.</string>
<string name="jump_invalid_port">Jump server port must be a number. Using 22.</string>
<string name="ssh_missing_config">Add SSH details in Settings to connect.</string>
<string name="ssh_invalid_port">Port must be a number. Using 22.</string>
<string name="status_helper_disconnected">Add SSH details in Settings to start a session.</string>
<string name="status_helper_connected">Session is active. Terminal output will appear below.</string>
<string name="status_helper_failed">Could not connect. Check your host and try again.</string>
<string name="status_helper_ready">Ready to open terminal or run plays.</string>
<string name="status_helper_play_running">Play is running in a separate SSH connection.</string>
<string name="gemini_status_disabled">Gemini is off. Enable it in settings to use voice commands.</string>
<string name="gemini_status_missing_key">Gemini needs an API key. Add one in settings.</string>
<string name="gemini_status_ready">Gemini is ready for voice input.</string>
<string name="gemini_output_error">Gemini could not generate a command.</string>
<string name="gemini_voice_prompt">Describe the command you want to run.</string>
<string name="gemini_permission_denied">Microphone permission is required for voice commands.</string>
<string name="settings_subtitle">Manage optional integrations for voice and cloud logs.</string>
<string name="theme_section_subtitle">Choose app theme. Auto follows your device setting.</string>
<string name="test_connection_idle">Run a quick check using the active host.</string>
<string name="gemini_settings_subtitle">Optional voice control for SSH commands. Requires your own Gemini API key or Google sign-in.</string>
<string name="gemini_missing_key_message">Missing API key. Add one in settings.</string>
<string name="gemini_model_helper">Pro gives better results for complex requests. Flash is faster and cheaper.</string>
<string name="gemini_nano_preferred_helper">Uses Nano when available. Falls back to cloud Gemini otherwise.</string>
<string name="gemini_status_nano_downloadable">Gemini Nano available to download. See settings.</string>
<string name="drive_section_subtitle">Sign in to upload console logs to your Drive.</string>
<string name="drive_always_save_toggle">Always save console logs to Drive</string>
<string name="drive_always_save_helper">Uploads logs to Drive after each terminal session and after each play run.</string>
<string name="about_description">sushi is an open-source SSH client for Android, built with focus on clean design and modern tooling.</string>
<string name="keys_subtitle">Generate and manage the SSH key used for authentication.</string>
<string name="phrases_empty_toast">No phrases saved. Add some in Phrases menu.</string>
<string name="phrase_name_exists">A phrase with this name already exists</string>
<string name="import_parse_error_toast">Failed to parse JSON from clipboard</string>
<string name="plays_subtitle">Manage reusable host activities with optional parameters.</string>
<string name="plays_empty_toast">No plays saved. Add one in Plays.</string>
<string name="play_name_exists">A play with this name already exists</string>
<string name="play_missing_hosts">Add at least one host before running plays.</string>
<string name="play_status_running_toast">Wait for current play to finish.</string>
<string name="play_desc_install_key">Install Sushi public key to authorized_keys without duplicates.</string>
<string name="play_desc_remove_keys">Remove all Sushi-managed keys from authorized_keys.</string>
<string name="play_desc_reboot_host">Reboot placeholder: logs out from selected host.</string>
<string name="play_desc_change_password">Change one user password on the selected host.</string>
<string name="terminal_font_section_subtitle">Adjust the text size in the terminal view.</string>

issue.message: The resource string "app_name_long" has been marked as translatable="false" elsewhere (usually in the `values` folder), but is translated to "fi" (Finnish) here
Formatting %d followed by words ("via"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("new"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
`checkClientTrusted` is empty, which could cause insecure network traffic due to trusting arbitrary TLS/SSL certificates presented by peers
`checkServerTrusted` is empty, which could cause insecure network traffic due to trusting arbitrary TLS/SSL certificates presented by peers
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `@color/sushi_mist` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.Sushi`)
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `@color/sushi_mist` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.Sushi`)
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `@color/sushi_mist` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.Sushi`)
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `@color/sushi_mist` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.Sushi`)
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `@color/sushi_mist` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.Sushi`)
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `@color/sushi_mist` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.Sushi`)
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `@color/sushi_mist` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.Sushi`)
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `@color/sushi_mist` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.Sushi`)
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `@color/sushi_terminal_bg_dark` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.Sushi`)

issue.message: The following images appear both as density independent `.xml` files and as bitmap files: src/main/res/drawable/ic_launcher.xml, src/main/res/mipmap-hdpi/ic_launcher.png
Launcher icon used as round icon did not have a circular shape
Launcher icon used as round icon did not have a circular shape
Launcher icon used as round icon did not have a circular shape
Launcher icon used as round icon did not have a circular shape

Number formatting does not take into account locale settings. Consider using `String.format` instead.
